run_summary.summary: Gmail auth token is expired or revoked — Brandi couldn't connect to the inbox this run. No emails were scanned and no deals were updated. To fix: re-authorize Gmail access and refresh the OAuth token in the Brandi configuration.

suggestions.message: Gmail OAuth token is expired/revoked. Brandi needs a fresh refresh token to scan emails. Please re-authorize Gmail access — the current refresh_token in Brandi's run config returned 'invalid_grant'.
